description: A fully compliant draft with no violations
draft:
Subject: Reduce Counterfeit Risk at Acme with Acme Shield Pro
Body:
Hi Alex, counterfeit enforcement queues at Acme often stall when detection and action workflows drift apart. Acme Shield Pro helps your team detect risky patterns, prioritize high-impact cases, and route follow-up actions without losing context. In week one we run a focused sweep and hand over a prioritized enforcement workflow by risk tier.

Open to a 15-min call to share a quick teardown and a recommended enforcement workflow? Worth a look / Not a priority?

session.cta_lock_effective: Open to a 15-min call to share a quick teardown and a recommended enforcement workflow? Worth a look / Not a priority?
